nasb.text: And Jesus began to say, as He taught in the temple, “How is it that the scribes say that the Christ is the son of David?

esv.text: And as Jesus taught in the temple, he said, “How can the scribes say that the Christ is the son of David?

cnv.text: 耶穌在殿裡教訓人，說：“經學家怎麼說基督是大衛的子孫呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣在圣殿里教导的时候，问道：“律法教师为什么说基督是大卫的后裔呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣在圣殿里教导人的时候问：“经文士们怎么说基督是大卫的后裔呢？
